name: Rum Punch
description: A fruit-forward punch combining Bacardi Spiced rum, Bacardi Carta Blanca rum, and mixed juices. Having a get together? Serve up Rum Punch. Combining BACARDÍ Spiced rum, BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum and a blend of fruit juices, it's a party pleaser.
recipe_steps: Mix: In a large container, combine all the liquid ingredients.
Chill: Refrigerate the mix until chilled.
Get set: Just before serving, pour into a large punch bowl, stirring in ice.
searchable_text: Rum Punch main rum BACARDÍ Spiced rum A fruit-forward punch combining Bacardi Spiced rum, Bacardi Carta Blanca rum, and mixed juices. Having a get together? Serve up Rum Punch. Combining BACARDÍ Spiced rum, BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum and a blend of fruit juices, it's a party pleaser. ingredients 150 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum, 75 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 37.5 ml grenadine, 150 ml orange juice, 75 ml cranberry juice, 150 ml pineapple juice recipe steps Mix: In a large container, combine all the liquid ingredients. Chill: Refrigerate the mix until chilled. Get set: Just before serving, pour into a large punch bowl, stirring in ice.
